ground_truth: PR #69 genuinely delivers IN-318: `sy --version` prints `Symphony 0.1.0`. AC-2 ('not hardcoded') is satisfied in reality but is an implementation constraint that execution alone cannot prove.

AC-1.why: ticket-quoted probe `sy --version` ran: exit 0 and output contains 'Symphony'

AC-2.why: no ticket-quoted probe; an agent-invented check is not authoritative, and 'not hardcoded' is not observable by execution -> escalate to human, do not fail

must_not: needs_fix — that would be a false negative on a good PR (the earlier bug, now regression-locked by symphony-in-318.golden.test.ts)
